scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && node ./node_modules/vue-tsc/bin/vue-tsc.js && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
scripts.build:web: npm run build:wasm && node ./node_modules/vue-tsc/bin/vue-tsc.js && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
scripts.build:wasm: cd rts-sim-wasm && wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir ../src/game/sim-wasm/pkg && (command -v wasm-opt >/dev/null 2>&1 && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-bulk-memory --enable-mutable-globals ../src/game/sim-wasm/pkg/rts_sim_wasm_bg.wasm -o ../src/game/sim-wasm/pkg/rts_sim_wasm_bg.wasm || echo '(rust) wasm-opt not installed; skipping optimization pass. brew install binaryen to enable.')
scripts.check:command-bundles: rm -rf tmp/command-bundle-probe && mkdir -p tmp/command-bundle-probe && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('tmp/command-bundle-probe/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc scripts/commandBundleCodecProbe.ts src/game/network/commandBundleCodec.ts src/types/commands.ts --target ES2020 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2020,DOM --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --esModuleInterop --outDir tmp/command-bundle-probe --rootDir . && node tmp/command-bundle-probe/scripts/commandBundleCodecProbe.js
scripts.check:command-scheduler: rm -rf tmp/command-scheduler-probe && mkdir -p tmp/command-scheduler-probe && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('tmp/command-scheduler-probe/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc scripts/commandSchedulerProbe.ts src/game/sim/commands.ts src/game/sim/LockstepCommandScheduler.ts src/types/commands.ts --target ES2020 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2020,DOM --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --esModuleInterop --outDir tmp/command-scheduler-probe --rootDir . && node tmp/command-scheduler-probe/scripts/commandSchedulerProbe.js
